name: Mia Gonzales
title: Attending Physician
bio: Dr. Gonzales received her medical degree from The University of Texas Health Science center in San Antonio, Tx. She then completed a combined residency in Emergency/Internal Medicine at ECU Health, where she also completed her Critical Care fellowship. She is board certified in Emergency, Internal, and Critical Care Medicine. She enjoys gardening, traveling with her husband, and hanging out with her dogs.
education: The University of Texas Health Science Center- San Antonio
